## Overview

## Communication Preferences

> Populated over time. What works, what doesn't.

- Operates in slide decks and Notion docs — Slack for scheduling and quick reactions only
- Wants TL;DR + supporting data, not narrative
- Will read long written docs — prefers that over meetings
- Does not read Jira; all her tracking lives in Notion
- Responds to email faster than Slack
